task_pools.display_name: MVP Computerized System Validation Task Pool
source_limitations: Wave 2 expands task-pool source content only.
Duration references are provisional and require Wave 3 planning-basis coverage.
Document expectations require Wave 4 template bodies and Wave 5 schema/DCF coverage before product-ready output.
Task-pool source records do not authorize productization, deployment, SaaS readiness, customer-ready release, or M29.12 UAT acceptance.

tasks.title: Capture computerized system change and validation scope
tasks.purpose: Capture change/control context, system boundary, lifecycle event, and validation route.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route
notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.

tasks.title: Confirm CSV URS and intended use
tasks.purpose: Confirm system intended use, GxP relevance, user roles, interfaces, supplier documents, and requirements basis.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route
notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.

tasks.title: Perform CSV RA/FMEA and GxP/data-integrity impact assessment
tasks.purpose: Assess GxP impact, data integrity, electronic records/signatures scope, and risk-based testing depth.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route
notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.

tasks.title: Establish CSV RTM basis
tasks.purpose: Map URS/vendor/FDS/SDS/specification requirements to tests and validation evidence.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route
notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.

tasks.title: Prepare CSV validation plan
tasks.purpose: Define validation approach, deliverables, roles, acceptance route, deviations/CAPA handling, and report path.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route
notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.

tasks.title: Prepare and execute CSV test protocol/report
tasks.purpose: Execute approved configuration, functional, security, data integrity, or intended-use testing as applicable.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route
notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.

tasks.title: Verify access/security/data-integrity controls
tasks.purpose: Verify user access, audit trail, backup/restore, security, and data handling controls where in scope.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route
notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.

tasks.title: Close computerized system validation package
tasks.purpose: Confirm deviations, CAPA, RTM, validation evidence, limitations, and VSR readiness.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route
notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.

library_controls: Wave 2 expands task-pool source records only.
Document expectations remain controlled references for later template/schema waves.
Duration references are provisional until Wave 3 planning-basis expansion resolves them.
This library does not generate documents, approve records, release outputs, or accept M29.12 UAT.
This library does not authorize productization, deployment, SaaS readiness, customer-ready release, or M29.12 UAT acceptance.
